summary: Specialty pharmacy order submission now uses a two-pass verification step, replacing the previous single-pass validation.
before: Single-pass validation for specialty pharmacy order submissions.
after: Two-pass verification step for specialty pharmacy order submissions.
required_actions: Update field team training materials before May 1
risks: Temporary increase in submission latency during transition
mitigations: Phased rollout starting with internal test accounts

faq.q: Does this affect all order types?
faq.a: No, only specialty pharmacy orders are affected.

sources.quote: routes specialty pharmacy orders through an updated verification step

decisions.reason: Workflow change visible to internal users and specialty pharmacy stakeholders.
Rollout scheduled for May 1, within 30-day communication window.
Before/after behavior clearly described, timeline confirmed, confidence 0.87.
